stemHtml: When reporting for a flight duty, the Commander is notified that one of the passengers is a deportee being accompanied by an escort. The reason why the Commander has been notified in advance is that...

options.a: the escort must be carrying a loaded weapon and therefore pose an increased risk in the cabin, otherwise there is NO requirement to notify about a deportee.
options.b: the escort is the person who is responsible for ensuring that the passenger is seated in such a way that the passenger does NOT impede an evacuation.
options.c: the deportee is a Special Category Passenger (SCP) who is carried under special conditions which the Operator has defined in its Operations Manual.
options.d: a deportee is the classification used in the regulations for a Person of Reduced Mobility (PRM) who benefits from having an escort to assist during the flight.
